scope: Books 1-5 = 64 lessons (B6 blocked: no textbook PDF). Author in order B1->B5.

policy.floor_note: ~1.5x the book's textbook article; reader's dict-tap + sentence-translation make longer reads easier. Naturalness > floor.
policy.variety: 3 distinct formats + varied scenes per lesson; vary across lessons
policy.copyright: original only; speakers 甲乙丙丁/高林周; never 王開文/陳月美/李明華

highlights_ready: B1L01-06 only; ALL other lessons need Highlights curation first (B1 table=PDF p19; B2/B3/B5=p7; B4=manual+image-only PDF).

B2.authoring: ALL 15 DONE + integrated (L04/06/13/14/15 authored, L08/10 repaired to floor, L05/07/09/11/12 sweep-critic clean)

B3.highlights: ALL 12 ready (curated 2026-07-01 from PDF pp.19-23, NOT p7)
B3.authoring: ALL 12 DONE + integrated (floor 750; critic-verified, B3L05/07 repaired for verbatim reuse)

B4.highlights: L01-04 ready (curated 2026-07-01 from PDF pp.20-21 vision-read; NO text layer). L05-12 todo.
B4.authoring: L01-04 DONE + integrated (floor 950; all gate-pass first try, critic-clean, no repairs). L05-12 todo.

integration: build_lesson_data.py now loads mockups/drafts/*.json as source (drafts = integration). Rebuild: python3 mockups/build_lesson_data.py
checker_fix: hc() now strips only a leading speaker label (colon within first 8 chars) — narrative 說：「…」 counts correctly
quality_note: B1 critic verdicts ok/good; B1L01 scene-variety=false (3 formats but same airport/tea scene) — polish candidate. B1 padding is inherent to its tiny vocab + 250 floor; eases in later books.
hybrid: coverage_qa + check_candidate allow <=3 deferred vocab/lesson (grammar 100%); coverage_ledger.py rolls deferrals forward; _deferred.json pool shown in print_lesson_spec
b2_author_script: workflows/scripts/author-companion-b2-validate-wf_29059c3e-e36.js (edit LESSONS to L04-15 + re-invoke for rest)
b2plus_prompt_improvements: 3 distinct situations (no same-event-retold/diary/sequel); no verbatim cross-article phrase reuse; write bare vocab (never copy spec annotations); use deferral budget vs padding; modest above-level vocab
validation_verdict: B2 improved prompt validated: sameEventRetold=false, sceneVariety=true, naturalness=good across L01-03; minor 'some' padding -> sharpened to prefer deferral over padding for L04-15
wave3_authoring_runId: wf_6ef9a903-3d6 (B2 gaps+repairs ×7, B3 ×12, sweep ×5 — Sonnet 5 author/critic/repair)
b3_highlights_note: B3 Highlights are at PDF pp.19-23 (各課重點 banner), verified on page images; raw-bN.txt extractor grabs the TOC (p7) by mistake — go straight to Read tool pages= next time. Same likely for B4/B5.
b3_deferrals: within-budget deck artifacts only: B3L08 defers EMBA + X分之Y; B3L10 defers 照X光 (Latin-containing pseudo-words / pattern annotations). X光 itself IS used naturally in B3L10 (standard Taiwanese medical orthography).
STOP_POINT: Stopped at Book 4 Lesson 4 per Wedge 2026-07-01 (matches where his own Chinese lessons reach). DONE+integrated: B1×15, B2×15, B3×12, B4L01-04 = 46 lessons. Remaining: B4L05-12 (floor 950, need Highlights pp.22+ vision-read), B5L01-10 (floor 1000, re-verify page). B6 blocked (no PDF).
